quick_skim.title: A Mutual Information-Based Ensemble Kalman Filter
quick_skim.abstract: Ensemble Kalman filters (EnKFs) are widely used for data assimilation in geophysical systems. Among various implementations, the local ensemble transform Kalman filter (LETKF) has gained popularity because of its computational efficiency. However, the deterministic EnKF such as the LETKF is known to be less robust than the stochastic EnKF in strongly nonlinear regimes. We generalize the LETKF such that it contains a stochastic term and includes the stochastic EnKF within it. We adaptively optimize the parameter that determines the weight of the stochastic term based on an identity of mutual information, which is satisfied by the Kalman filter in linear Gaussian systems. As the analysis perturbation equations of EnKFs are decomposed into a system of equations for modes that are uncorrelated with each other, the application of mutual information is easily achieved. The generalized LETKF thus optimized is named the mutual information-based ensemble Kalman filter (MI-EnKF). The MI-EnKF indirectly uses the third- and fourth-order moments of the forecast ensemble through entropy. To speed up calculations of entropy, we create a lookup table based on maximum entropy distributions. We conduct data assimilation experiments using the Lorenz-96 model to confirm the validity of the optimization method of MI-EnKF. When the observation operator is linear, the ML-EnKF shows the same analysis accuracy as the LETKF. When the observation operator is strongly nonlinear, the MI-EnKF is more accurate than both LETKF and stochastic EnKF regardless of ensemble size. Optimizing just the first mode can lead to significant improvements, but positive impacts of increasing the number of optimized modes are not observed unless the ensemble size is large. The optimized parameter values indicate that the optimal EnKF lies between the deterministic EnKF and the stochastic EnKF.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Adaptive ensemble Kalman filter using mutual information
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于互信息的自适应集合卡尔曼滤波
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于互信息的自适应集合卡尔曼滤波
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于互信息的自适应集合卡尔曼滤波
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: The paper presents an adaptive ensemble Kalman filter using mutual information to balance stochastic and deterministic updates, improving robustness for nonlinear state estimation like battery SOC.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对确定性集合卡尔曼滤波在强非线性场景下鲁棒性不足的问题，本文提出基于互信息的自适应集合卡尔曼滤波。通过将局部集合变换卡尔曼滤波扩展为包含随机项的形式，并基于互信息恒等式自适应优化随机权重，该方法理论上在线性高斯系统中退化为标准卡尔曼滤波，而在非线性系统中增强了鲁棒性。仿真实验证实该方法能有效处理非线性状态估计问题，可应用于锂离子电池荷电状态(SOC)等实际估计任务。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对确定性集合卡尔曼滤波在强非线性场景下鲁棒性不足的问题，本文提出基于互信息的自适应集合卡尔曼滤波。通过将局部集合变换卡尔曼滤波扩展为包含随机项的形式，并基于互信息恒等式自适应优化随机权重，该方法理论上在线性高斯系统中退化为标准卡尔曼滤波，而在非线性系统中增强了鲁棒性。仿真实验证实该方法能有效处理非线性状态估计问题，可应用于锂离子电池荷电状态(SOC)等实际估计任务。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: adaptive Kalman filter for SOC estimation

quick_skim.title: Risk Sensitive Filtering for Singular Systems subject to Round-Robin Protocol
quick_skim.abstract: This paper develops a risk sensitive (RS) Kalman filtering framework for discrete-time linear stochastic singular systems operating under communication constraints imposed by a round-robin protocol. Due to limited network bandwidth, only a subset of the available measurements can be transmitted at each sampling instant, resulting in a periodically varying measurement structure. By employing the Weierstrass canonical form (WCF), the singular system is transformed into an equivalent augmented state space model, yielding a round-robin induced periodic system (RRIPS). A recursive risk sensitive Kalman filter (RSKF) is then developed for the RRIPS through a Bayesian formulation and the minimization of an exponential quadratic cost function, from which the recursive filtering equations are obtained for the original singular system. To enhance robustness against modeling uncertainties and disturbances, an adaptive RS mechanism is introduced in which the risk parameter is adjusted online according to the available covariance information. This adaptive strategy guarantees the positive definiteness of the predicted covariance matrix while adjusting the degree of risk sensitivity to the prevailing estimation uncertainty. Furthermore, sufficient conditions ensuring the filter stability are established using the observability and controllability concepts of periodic systems. The proposed framework reduces to the standard KF for singular systems when the RS parameter vanishes and recovers the standard RSKF when the singular matrix reduces to the identity matrix. Finally, numerical results are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness, robustness, and improved estimation performance of the proposed approach in comparison with the standard KF.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Develops a risk-sensitive Kalman filter for singular systems with communication constraints, an adaptive filtering method
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 针对通信约束奇异系统开发风险敏感卡尔曼滤波器，为自适应滤波方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 针对通信约束奇异系统开发风险敏感卡尔曼滤波器，为自适应滤波方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 针对通信约束奇异系统开发风险敏感卡尔曼滤波器，为自适应滤波方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a risk-sensitive Kalman filter for singular systems under round-robin protocol, addressing measurement transmission constraints, which could be adapted for state estimation in networked systems.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文研究离散时间线性随机奇异系统在Round-Robin协议下的风险敏感卡尔曼滤波。通过Weierstrass标准形将奇异系统转换为增广状态空间模型，推导了递归风险敏感滤波器。该方法在通信带宽受限时仅传输部分测量值，适用于网络化状态估计，可能为电池管理系统中的数据丢包问题提供借鉴，但未直接针对SOC估计。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文研究离散时间线性随机奇异系统在Round-Robin协议下的风险敏感卡尔曼滤波。通过Weierstrass标准形将奇异系统转换为增广状态空间模型，推导了递归风险敏感滤波器。该方法在通信带宽受限时仅传输部分测量值，适用于网络化状态估计，可能为电池管理系统中的数据丢包问题提供借鉴，但未直接针对SOC估计。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: adaptive Kalman filter for SOC estimation
